column1: *根據2024 QS世界大學排名，本校排名為219。Based on 2024 QS World University Ranking, NYCU is ranked 217th.

***系所年級/語言能力/在校成績限制依照姐妹校規定表述，但姐妹校可能隨時調整規定，請依照姐妹校官網為準。系所以主修或雙主修為準，年級以出國交換時之年級為準。All requirements are set by partner institutions; however, institutions can update their requirements from time to time. Please refer to their website for most updated information. Double major can be used to fuifill the home department requirements. The year of study requirment refers to the year of study during exchange.

紫色字體校名者為「拓荒者計畫」學校，率取且符合本校出國交換獎學金標準之學生，可優先獲得較高額補助。Instiition names in purple are part of the Trailblazer program that students accepted and fulfilled NYCU's requirements of the outbound exchange student scholarships will be granted higher amount of scholarships.
